audit_items.proof_trace: Block transactions execute before gas cap validation. BlockProcessor.ProcessOne calls ProcessBlock (L62) which executes transactions (L106) without invoking ValidateSuggestedBlock. Gas cap validator (GasLimitCapTxValidator.IsWellFormed) exists but is only called in ValidateSuggestedBlock, which is never invoked before execution in the main processing pipeline.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker constructs block with transactions exceeding EIP-7825 gas cap and propagates via P2P. BlockchainProcessor enqueues block, BranchProcessor calls BlockProcessor.ProcessOne which executes all transactions before any validation, consuming excessive gas and enabling DoS.
